languages.text: "...мира, разорванного влиянием звезды Глаз Жнеца в Процессии Проклятых. Его главная ценность — в том, что сотворившая его аномалия является моей ровесницей".

traits.locale_text: "Кусок мира, разорванного влиянием звезды Глаз Жнеца в Процессии Проклятых. Его главная ценность — в том, что сотворившая его аномалия является моей ровесницей".

languages.text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."
languages.original_text: "...мира, разорванного влиянием звезды Глаз Жнеца в Процессии Проклятых. Его главная ценность — в том, что сотворившая его аномалия является моей ровесницей".

traits.locale_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."
"A piece of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."
"A piece of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."
"...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

languages.text: “……来自那个因受到亡者行军中收割者之眼星体的影响而撕裂出来的世界。它最大的价值在于，造就它的那个异常现象，与我一样古老。”
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: “……来自那个因受到亡者行军中收割者之眼星体的影响而撕裂出来的世界。它最大的价值在于，造就它的那个异常现象，与我一样古老。”

languages.text: «... de un mundo desgarrado por la influencia de la estrella Ojo del Segador en la Procesión de los Condenados. Su mayor valor es que la anomalía que le dio origen es casi tan antigua como yo».
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: «... de un mundo desgarrado por la influencia de la estrella Ojo del Segador en la Procesión de los Condenados. Su mayor valor es que la anomalía que le dio origen es casi tan antigua como yo».

languages.text: « ... du monde tombé sous l'influence funeste de l'étoile de l'Œil de la Faucheuse dans la Procession des Damnés. Sa valeur réside dans le fait que l'anomalie à l'origine de sa création est aussi ancienne que moi. »
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: « ... du monde tombé sous l'influence funeste de l'étoile de l'Œil de la Faucheuse dans la Procession des Damnés. Sa valeur réside dans le fait que l'anomalie à l'origine de sa création est aussi ancienne que moi. »

languages.text: "Lanetliler Kafilesi'ndeki Biçen'in Gözü yıldızının etkisiyle parçalanmış dünyanın bir parçası. En büyük değeri, onu yaratan anomalinin benim kadar eski olmasıdır."
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: "Lanetliler Kafilesi'ndeki Biçen'in Gözü yıldızının etkisiyle parçalanmış dünyanın bir parçası. En büyük değeri, onu yaratan anomalinin benim kadar eski olmasıdır."

languages.text: "... der Welt, die durch den Einfluss eines Sterns namens Reaper's Eye in der Prozession der Verbannten zerbrach. Ihr größter Wert ist der Umstand, dass die dadurch bedingte Anomalie genauso alt ist wie ich."
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: "... der Welt, die durch den Einfluss eines Sterns namens Reaper's Eye in der Prozession der Verbannten zerbrach. Ihr größter Wert ist der Umstand, dass die dadurch bedingte Anomalie genauso alt ist wie ich."

languages.text: 「…死者の行列で、死神の眼の星の影響で引き裂かれた世界の一部。その最大の魅力は、それを生み出した異常が私の年齢と同じくらい古いことだ。」
languages.original_text: "...of the world torn apart by the influence of the Reaper's Eye star in the Processional of the Damned. Its greatest value is that the anomaly that created it is as old as I am."

traits.locale_text: 「…死者の行列で、死神の眼の星の影響で引き裂かれた世界の一部。その最大の魅力は、それを生み出した異常が私の年齢と同じくらい古いことだ。」
